page.title: Settings
page.description: Adjust teammate hand-card preview scale, toggle key, and keyword-based border highlights.
toggleKey.label: Toggle Key
toggleKey.description: Records a keyboard shortcut; supports modifier-only bindings (e.g. Shift) and modifier combos.
contentScale.label: Content Size
contentScale.description: Scales the mini card previews shown beside each teammate.
keywords.label: Highlight Keywords
keywords.emptyDescription: Cards containing this keyword will receive a border.
keywords.description: Keywords are matched case-insensitively against card keywords and hover tips.
color.label: Border Color
color.description: Includes a live preview, RGBA controls, and hex input such as #FFD740FF.
